svg.text: Suggested 20 to 25 second capture sequence for the repo README and microsite.

g.text: 1. Open the SEU dashboard with a clean runtime state.
2. Trigger the coding repo-scan overlap scenario.
3. Show two tasks attaching to one pending SEU during the admission window.
4. Let the SEU transition to EXECUTING and then COMPLETED.
5. Pan briefly to the metrics cards showing executions saved.
6. Trigger the unique-task counterexample to show false-collapse safety.
